title: Setup — Papa+Eva already in the surf, Sara digging on sand off-frame
prompt: Wide cinematic kid-show shot on @beach-shore facing the gentle blue surf rolling in softly. @Papa already CENTER-FRAME standing knee-deep in the calm gentle surf with both feet planted firmly on the sandy seabed, water at his shins, broad smile, both hands gently gripping @Eva's ankles to keep her safely steady. Papa has exactly two arms and two hands visible. Eva already perched up safely on Papa's shoulders, curly blonde hair with rainbow bow, both arms held high above her head with happy open hands, laughing with cheerful warm eye-crinkle. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands visible. Sun glittering softly on the wet sand at the tide line. The water around Papa's legs stays calm and gentle — small soft ripples, no big waves, no foam, no splashing high. (BEAT 1 — 0-5s) A small soft wave gently laps against Papa's shins with a soft swoosh. Eva giggles brightly above. Eva (cheerful sing-song laugh): "Daddy! The water's TICKLY!" Papa (warm dad-laugh, eyes crinkled): "Hold tight, little explorer!" (BEAT 2 — 5-10s) Eva looks down to her left toward the dry sand beyond the surf, smiling. Papa rocks gently from side to side in the calm water, very slowly, swaying her playfully. Eva (delighted): "I'm SO TALL!" Papa (warm chuckle): "Tallest little waves-watcher on the beach." Calm cheerful kid-show ocean ambiance — gentle wave swoosh, soft seagulls in distance. STRICT ANATOMY: Papa has exactly two arms and two hands at all times. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands at all times. Papa stays grounded with both feet on the sandy seabed throughout — no swimming, no leaping, no jumping, no falling. Eva stays safely seated on Papa's shoulders throughout. The surf stays plain blue gentle calm water — no big waves, no foam, no red, no marks.
